Per-dimension statistics (norm & cosine: max / min / mean / var)
  Methods: LLL / BKZ / ENUM / ENUM+SIEVE
  ||b1||    = shortest vector length
  ||b1||/GH = length over Gaussian-Heuristic (near 1 = good)
  max|cos|, mean|cos| aggregated across seeds within each dimension
  var = population variance (ddof=0)
==============================================================================================================
    method  dim  n_seeds       b1_max      b1_min     b1_mean       b1_var  b1_gh_max  b1_gh_min  b1_gh_mean  b1_gh_var  max_cos_max  max_cos_min  max_cos_mean  max_cos_var  mean_cos_max  mean_cos_min  mean_cos_mean  mean_cos_var
